{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/11199794?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DenizParlak", "id": 11199794, "login": "DenizParlak", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjExMTk5Nzk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DenizParlak", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41266", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-522", "name": "Insufficiently Protected Credentials"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

`/api/v1/public-chatbotConfig/:id `ep exposes sensitive data including API keys, HTTP authorization headers and internal configuration without any authentication. An attacker with knowledge just of a chatflow UUID can retrieve credentials stored in password type fields and HTTP headers, leading to credential theft and more.

### Details

Knowledge of chatflow UUID can be obtained from embedded chat widgets, referrer headers or logs and it's the only prerequest. 

`getSinglePublicChatbotConfig` function in `packages/server/src/services/chatflows/index.ts` returns the full **flowData** object without authorization check or data sanitization.

There is a comment as **"Safe as public endpoint as chatbotConfig doesn't contain sensitive credential"** but **flowData** does contain sensitive data such as:

`type: 'password'` fields are stored in plaintext (unstructuredAPIKey in S3File node).
HTTP Authorization headers in POST / GET Requests nodes.
Internal API endpoints and webhook URLs.

### PoC

- Add an S3 File node, set "File Processing Method" to "Unstructured".
- Enter an API key in "Unstructured API KEY" field or add a Requests Post node with Authorization header.
- Save the chatflow.

`curl -s "https://localhost/api/v1/public-chatbotConfig/{CHATFLOW_UUID}"`

Response:

```
{
  "flowData": "{...\"unstructuredAPIKey\":\"victim_key\"...\"requestsPostHeaders\":\"Bearer victim_token\"...}"
}
```

### Impact

Impacts all Flowise Cloud users with chatflows containing password type fields or any HTTP headers. And self hosted Flowise instances exposed to the internet.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00346, "percentile": 0.26569}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T21:44:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41266"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T20:16:15Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T21:44:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41266", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "Flowise: Sensitive Data Leak in public-chatbotConfig ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:58:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4jpm-cgx2-8h37", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.0.13"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flowise: Sensitive Data Leak in public-chatbotConfig
